caption: A man wearing glasses, a grey wig, a white shirt, and suspenders sits in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall filled with framed photographs and clothing racks with "LEE" branding. A logo on the screen reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, speaking while gesturing slightly with his head and facial expressions. He appears to be engaged in a conversation or recording a segment, with his mouth opening and closing as he speaks across the sequence of images. The camera angle remains static, capturing him from the chest up against the backdrop of the studio's decor and equipment.
